input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.8.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.8.3.2
            TITLE: when the front hoop is integrally bonded or laminated to the monocoque f.7.4.3, provide:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.8.3.2: When the Front Hoop is integrally bonded or laminated to the monocoque F.7.4.3, provide:
IN.8.3.2 When the Front Hoop is integrally bonded or laminated to the monocoque F.7.4.3, provide:  
a. Documentation that shows dimensions on the tubes 
b. Pictures of the dimensioned tube being included in the layup

final_answer: IN.8.3.2 When the Front Hoop is integrally bonded or laminated to the monocoque F.7.4.3, provide: a. Documentation that shows dimensions on the tubes b. Pictures of the dimensioned tube being included in the layup
